creator: phi@evilphi.com
text:
The managesieve plugin was updated from v0.10.3 to v0.10.4 for dovecot v1.1.6 and v1.1.7.  The mail/dovecot-managesieve port was updated to 0.10.4 and will not build without this update since there is no distinfo data for the new managesieve plugin distfile.

Fix: The provided patch updates distinfo with the required information for the managesieve plugin distfile, dovecot-1.1.6-managesieve-0.10.4.diff.gz.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Try to build mail/dovecot-managesieve with a current ports tree.
